ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of release */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID of the movie */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Season number of the episode */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number within the season */,
  "status" TEXT /* Production status of the movie */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "box_office" REAL /* Box office revenue of the movie */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief synopsis of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frames" (
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frame */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the frame belongs to */,
  "frame_num" INTEGER /* Frame number within the movie */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the frame within the movie */,
  "img_height" INTEGER /* Height of the frame image in pixels */,
  "img_width" INTEGER /* Width of the frame image in pixels */,
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the scene */,
  "scene_description" TEXT /* Description of the scene */,
  "frame_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the frame */,
  "frame_source" TEXT /* Source of the frame */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frames_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the object */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of the object */,
  "object_category" TEXT /* Category of the object */,
  "object_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the object */,
  "object_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detections" (
  "detection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detection */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame where the object was detected */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object detected */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence score of the detection */,
  "x1" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the top-left corner of the bounding box */,
  "y1" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the top-left corner of the bounding box */,
  "x2" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the bottom-right corner of the bounding box */,
  "y2" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the bottom-right corner of the bounding box */,
  "obj_height" INTEGER /* Height of the detected object in pixels */,
  "obj_width" INTEGER /* Width of the detected object in pixels */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the bounding box in pixels */,
  "pct_of_frame" REAL /* Percentage of the frame occupied by the object */,
  "detection_time" TEXT /* Time when the detection was made */,
  "detection_algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for detection */,
  "detection_model_version" TEXT /* Version of the detection model */,
  "detection_status" TEXT /* Status of the detection */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* User who reviewed the detection */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detections_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detections_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., editor, producer, data scientist) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being accessed */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of the metadata */,
  "metadata_source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_metadata_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frame_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of the metadata */,
  "metadata_source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_metadata_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of the metadata */,
  "metadata_source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_metadata_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detection_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "detection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the detection */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of the metadata */,
  "metadata_source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detection_metadata_detection_id FOREIGN KEY ("detection_id") REFERENCES detections ("detection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "default_permission_set" TEXT /* Default set of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource being accessed (e.g., movie, frame, detection) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frame_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frame */,
  "version_num" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_creator" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "version_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the version change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frame_versions_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES frames ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detection_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "detection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the detection */,
  "version_num" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_creator" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "version_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the version change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detection_versions_detection_id FOREIGN KEY ("detection_id") REFERENCES detections ("detection_id")
)
